Can you please give brief on phone: The Redmi 15 5G stands out with its vibrant 6.67-inch FHD+ AMOLED display, offering a silky-smooth 120Hz refresh rate and 1000 nits peak brightness for excellent outdoor visibility. Under the hood, it is powered by the efficient MediaTek Dimensity 6080 5G chipset, paired with up to 8GB of RAM to handle multitasking and modern gaming with ease. Photography is handled by a sharp 50MP AI main camera, while the massive 5000mAh battery ensures over a full day of heavy use, supported by 33W fast charging. Notably, it retains fan-favorite features like the 3.5mm headphone jack, an IR Blaster for remote control functionality, and runs on the latest Xiaomi HyperOS based on Android 14 for a refined, fast user experience.
What are the key features of the Redmi 1: The Redmi 15 5G features a 6.67-inch AMOLED display with a 120Hz refresh rate, a powerful MediaTek Dimensity 5G chipset, and a 50MP AI triple camera setup.
What is the battery capacity and chargin: It comes with a large 5000mAh battery that supports 33W fast charging, allowing you to get a full charge in about an hour.
How is the camera performance?: The phone features a 50MP main sensor that performs great in daylight, supported by an 8MP ultra-wide and a 2MP macro lens for versatile photography.
Does it support expandable storage?: Yes, the Redmi 15 5G includes a hybrid microSD card slot, allowing you to expand your storage up to 1TB.
Is the Redmi 15 5G water-resistant?: It has an IP53 rating, which means it is protected against dust and light splashes of water, but it is not fully waterproof.
What is the price of the Redmi 15 5G?: Pricing starts around ₹14,999 to ₹16,999 depending on the RAM and storage variant you choose.
Does it have a 3.5mm headphone jack?: Yes, unlike many flagship phones, the Redmi 15 5G still includes a 3.5mm headphone jack for your wired earphones.
How do I give feedback about the phone?: You can provide feedback through the 'Services & Feedback' app pre-installed on your MIUI/HyperOS, or visit the official Xiaomi community forums.
Is the display protected by Gorilla Glas: Yes, the front display is protected by Corning Gorilla Glass 3 to prevent minor scratches and drops.
What software does it run on?: The phone runs on Xiaomi's latest HyperOS, based on Android 14, offering a smooth and customizable user experience.
